title: Ai-ML Developer - Protolab, IFM Mauritius Rosehill, Mauritius
description: I worked on fine-tuning image tagging and classification models based on the OpenCLIP and EfficientNet architectures. I implemented a Flask API for model inference using WSL and Tailscale SSH. I also implemented a React frontend for the image gallery, tagging and classification.

title: Freelance Web Developper - AEES Services, Lubumbashi, DR Congo
